svg.text: Clements 47 - guitar-tuner machine head, side section (1:1 mm)
Guitar tuner (adapted from Thingiverse 6099101 noamtsvi, CC-BY-NC)
Worm-and-wheel direct drive. Plywood sectioned; case sectioned on the string-axis plane to reveal gear post and worm.
(dashed = back face of case, 12.6 into page)

g.text: gear post Ø 15.4 x 42.6 L | worm 19.3 OD knob, 10 OD thread, 47.7 L
plywood 6 thick | inter-ply gap 12.7 | hole Ø 16 clearance
User turns knob; worm thread rotates post;
post rotation wraps/unwraps string to tune.
